message:
feat(status): surface latest crash bundle in wa status output

Add crash bundle info to both `wa status --health` JSON output
(as `latest_crash` field with message, timestamp, location, path)
and the rich text mode (compact "Last crash" line with bundle path).

Combined with the wa-upg.13.4 doctor integration, crash bundles
are now discoverable from both `wa status` and `wa doctor` without
digging into the filesystem.

Closes wa-upg.13.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
